string.text: The SRS99-AM marksman rifle is an advanced weapon renowned for its exceptional accuracy and long-range capabilities. Equipped with a high-powered scope, it enables precise targeting of distant adversaries with ease. This versatile rifle incorporates a semi-automatic firing mechanism, allowing for rapid follow-up shots while maintaining accuracy. Its impressive stopping power and armor-piercing rounds make it a formidable asset against heavily armored opponents. Additionally, the SRS99-AM features a magazine capacity that ensures sustained fire during engagements. With its sleek design and superior performance, this marksman rifle is a trusted choice for skilled sharpshooters operating in challenging combat scenarios.\n\n
Magazine for the SRS99 Anti Material rifle. Houses 4 .338 Magnum rounds.\n\n
Extended magazine for the SRS99 Anti Material rifle. Houses 9 .338 Magnum rounds.\n\n
